summary.shape_sentence: Early flush into demand, strong morning recovery, midday grind higher to a PM high, then sharp late selloff and partial rebound into the close.

goat.note: Opening flush reversed from lower blue-bank demand and launched the main morning recovery.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered near failed retests into upper supply and expanded during the late-afternoon rollover.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared at demand reactions and reclaim points, especially after the opening washout and midday dips.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Lower supply bands were broken during the recovery, but the top supply zone around 25390-25420 capped the session and was respected.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25110-25150 and 25190-25230 repeatedly attracted buyers; lower demand held on the late flush.

time_markers.10am_blue: Bullish reversal phase; price was reclaiming from the opening dip and pushing higher.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday pullback/rotation; upside structure intact but momentum slower.
time_markers.2pm_green: Near the upper extreme / post-peak area; price was tiring under stacked supply.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed after a late selloff and bounce, above the open but well below the HOD.

takeaway: Bullish recovery day with an opening flush, steady trend higher through midday, and a late failure at upper supply that turned into a liquidation-style selloff before a partial rebound.
